name: Velvet Bow Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow Cream - Pillowfort™
description: Accent your kid's bedroom for the holiday season with the Velvet Bow Kids' Decorative Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. This cream throw pillow is designed in a bow shape with allover flange detailing that elevates the look. Made of 100% cotton fabric with 100% polyester filling, this velvet throw pillow features a sewn-seam closure for a neat finish.
